markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Partner interview to assess Max Simon's sales experience for an Account Executive role.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Relevant Background:** Max Simon has a SaaS sales career selling to CMOs, with experience in both fast-paced startups (Moxo, Mosaic) and large enterprises (ContentSquare).](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Strategic Outbound:** He drives meetings with highly personalized outreach, using custom-branded Moxo demo environments and Loom videos to show prospects their future product.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Complex Deal Management:** He closed major deals (Citizens Bank, Kaplan) by aligning solutions to specific business initiatives (e.g., Citizens' "digital butler" program) and leveraging strong champion relationships.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Culture Fit:** He seeks a nimble, fast-paced startup environment, contrasting it with the slow compliance and security processes at his current 3,000-person company.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background & Motivation

  - [**Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Firebrand Media (AE):** Sold marketing campaigns to local businesses.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Moxo (SMB → Mid-Market AE):** Sold a white-label collaboration platform (from WebEx founders) for 4 years.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Mosaic (Manager, Biz Dev):** First go-to-market hire, building outbound and managing SDRs; left due to the narrow focus on residential real estate.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [**ContentSquare (Mid-Market AE):** Current role selling product analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [**Motivation:** The GrowthX role aligns his marketing and SaaS sales experience, targeting his familiar CMO ICP. He is not actively looking but is open to a role that's the right fit.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

### Outbound Strategy: Personalized Demos

  - [Max Simon uses a highly personalized outbound strategy to drive meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
    1.  [Create a custom-branded Moxo demo environment for the prospect's company.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
    2.  [Record a \~1-minute Loom video walking through the tailored demo.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
    3.  [Send the video in an email to demonstrate deep research and value alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach proves the outreach is not generic, building trust and showing a clear understanding of the prospect's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

### Deal Example 1: Citizens Bank

  - [**Context:** Outbounded Citizens Bank after seeing a press release for their "digital butler" program for high-net-worth individuals.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**Problem:** The bank's existing app and portal provided a poor customer experience.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [**Solution:** Moxo's SDKs were embedded into Citizens' platforms to enable a seamless, high-touch experience with features like secure chat and web conferencing.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Value:** Increased Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer engagement, reducing churn risk for a critical customer segment.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

### Deal Example 2: Kaplan Education

  - [**Context:** A \>1-year sales cycle with a large, complex organization.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [**Problem:** Kaplan was pivoting to a B2B model and needed a platform to streamline interactions with corporate clients.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Built a close relationship with the champion (Raul, Director of Digital Experience).](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
      - [**Weekly Prep Calls:** Raul prepped Max Simon on each stakeholder's priorities and concerns before meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
      - [**Outcome:** This enabled highly targeted conversations and was critical to navigating the complex deal.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [**Lesson Learned:** Do not assume alignment within large organizations; proactively confirm internal consensus.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

### GrowthX Context & Role

  - [**Tyler Pavlas (GrowthX AE):** Hit his annual quota in Q1 due to strong market timing (AI search), CEO Marcel's reputation, and a high-value product.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2121.0)
  - [**Enablement:** Proactive and self-directed. Tyler Pavlas learned by shadowing Marcel and connecting directly with EPD and delivery teams.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2317.0)
  - [**Sales Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)
      - [**Phase 1:** 8-week pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
      - [**Phase 2:** 12-month contract, typically $15k–$18k/mo ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2433.0)
  - [**AE Involvement:** AEs join kickoffs and check in during Phase 1 to ensure a smooth transition to Phase 2, but their primary focus is closing new deals.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler Pavlas:** Follow up with Max Simon on next steps in the interview process.](https://fathom.video/share/suBuhnXUkovM2ws-NssRXjJ-szxAbf3F?tab=summary&timestamp=2599.0)
